plugins.name: Subagents Dashboard
plugins.description: Monitor and spawn AI sub-agents from the Control UI. Real-time dashboard with status cards, agent details, and a Spawn modal with 14 categories.
plugins.author: Soulz

plugins.name: News Analyzer
plugins.description: AI newsroom: detects narrative run-ups, builds game theory decision trees, and predicts events from global news.
plugins.author: Soulz

plugins.name: App Store
plugins.description: Browse and install OpenClaw plugins from GitHub with one click. Curated marketplace with search, categories, and safe one-click installation.
plugins.author: Soulz

plugins.name: Telegram Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. Receive and respond to messages from Telegram users and groups.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Discord Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Discord servers. Handle messages, threads, and reactions in Discord channels.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Slack Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Slack workspaces. Process messages, threads, and app mentions in Slack channels.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: WhatsApp Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to WhatsApp Business API. Send and receive WhatsApp messages.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Microsoft Teams
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Microsoft Teams. Respond to messages and commands in Teams channels.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Matrix Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Matrix protocol rooms. Decentralized, open-standard messaging.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Signal Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Signal messenger. End-to-end encrypted messaging.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Memory (LanceDB)
plugins.description: LanceDB-backed long-term memory plugin with auto-recall and capture. Vector similarity search for conversation history.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Voice Call
plugins.description: Add voice call capabilities to OpenClaw. Real-time speech-to-text and text-to-speech.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Lobster Workflows
plugins.description: Typed workflow tool with resumable approvals. Build complex multi-step AI workflows with human-in-the-loop.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: LLM Task
plugins.description: Generic JSON-only LLM tool for structured tasks callable from workflows. Define and execute AI tasks programmatically.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: OpenTelemetry Diagnostics
plugins.description: Export OpenClaw diagnostics to OpenTelemetry compatible backends. Traces, metrics, and logs.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Nostr Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Nostr relays for NIP-04 encrypted direct messages. Decentralized social messaging.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: OpenProse
plugins.description: OpenProse VM skill pack with a /prose slash command. AI-powered creative writing and document generation.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Mattermost Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Mattermost servers. Self-hosted team messaging integration.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Twitch Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Twitch chat. Respond to commands and messages in live streams.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: LINE Channel
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to LINE messaging platform. Popular in Japan, Thailand, and Taiwan.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Google Chat
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Google Chat spaces and direct messages in Google Workspace.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.name: Nextcloud Talk
plugins.description: Connect OpenClaw to Nextcloud Talk conversations. Self-hosted communication platform.
plugins.author: OpenClaw

plugins.description: GitHub Copilot proxy provider for OpenClaw. Use Copilot credentials as an LLM provider.
plugins.author: OpenClaw
